skill.name: writing-assistant
skill.description: 写作助手 - 当用户说"我想写 XX"、"帮我梳理选题"、"怎么形成框架"、"给我组织思路"时触发。根据观点清晰度自动选择最优路线：清晰观点走"框架→内容"，模糊观点走"挖掘→选题→框架→内容"。
skill.summary: Structured writing assistant that adapts to topic clarity, guiding users from idea to finished article.
skill.author: yunshu0909

security_audit.summary: All 22 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The analyzer misidentified ASCII art flowchart characters as Ruby/shell command patterns, and Chinese text entropy as obfuscation indicators. No malicious code, command execution, network calls, or prompt injection was found. This is a legitimate markdown-based writing assistance skill.

content.user_title: Structure Your Ideas Into Clear Articles
content.value_statement: Writers often struggle to organize scattered thoughts into coherent articles. This skill guides you through a diagnosis-led process that adapts to your topic clarity, from idea mining to framework building to finished content.
actual_capabilities: Diagnose topic clarity and select optimal writing path
Mine scattered thoughts and organize them into insights
Identify core topics and craft compelling one-sentence statements
Build article frameworks with logical structure
Write complete articles following established frameworks
Adapt writing style to match user voice and tone
limitations: Cannot access external resources or research online
Does not handle citations or bibliography formatting
May require multiple iterations for complex topics
Does not support multimedia or image integration

use_cases.title: Convert Scattered Ideas Into Publishable Content
use_cases.description: You have many thoughts about a topic but cannot identify the core message. The skill guides you through mining ideas, selecting a topic, building a framework, and writing the article.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and bloggers with incomplete ideas

use_cases.title: Structure Clear Topics Efficiently
use_cases.description: You already know what you want to write about. The skill helps you build the framework and produce the content without unnecessary exploration phases.

use_cases.title: Organize Business Writing Projects
use_cases.description: Create structured business documents by following a systematic framework that ensures logical flow and reader value.
use_cases.target_user: Professionals creating reports and business documents

prompt_templates.title: Basic Article Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to write about {your topic}. Can you help me structure my ideas?
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have a vague idea and need guidance

prompt_templates.title: Topic Mining Session
prompt_templates.prompt: I have been thinking about {your topic} recently. I have some scattered thoughts but I am not sure how to organize them.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have raw ideas that need organization

prompt_templates.title: Framework Development
prompt_templates.prompt: My core message is {your main point}. Help me build a framework for an article that communicates this to {target audience}.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have clarity on your message

prompt_templates.title: Full Article Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Here is my outline {paste outline}. Please write a {word count} article following this structure while maintaining a {tone} tone.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you have a complete framework and need content

output_examples.input: I want to write about the value of continuous learning but I have too many disconnected thoughts.
output_examples.output: Stage 01 guided you through idea mining, capturing 12 insights. We identified your core message: continuous learning creates compounding returns. Your article framework: opening scenario, three evidence points, conclusion with action steps.

output_examples.input: My article topic is 'Why Remote Work Improves Productivity' and I have a clear thesis statement.
output_examples.output: We skipped exploration and went directly to framework building. Your 1000-word article will have: opening with common objection, three productivity pillars with examples, counterargument acknowledgment, closing call-to-action.

best_practices: Be honest about your topic clarity during diagnosis to get the right workflow
Provide specific examples and real scenarios when sharing insights
Review the framework carefully before proceeding to content writing
anti_patterns: Do not skip the diagnosis phase even if you think your topic is clear
Avoid vague prompts like 'help me write something' without context
Do not rush through framework discussion; structure determines quality

faq.question: How long does the process take?
faq.answer: The process duration depends on topic complexity and clarity. A clear topic may take 15-30 minutes. A vague topic with extensive mining may take 45-60 minutes or more across multiple sessions.

faq.question: What if I cannot articulate my core message?
faq.answer: That is normal and expected. The skill includes techniques to help you discover your core message through structured exploration and targeted questions.

faq.question: Can I use this for technical documentation?
faq.answer: Yes. The framework approach works for technical writing. Focus on clarity during the framework phase and specify your technical audience during discussion.

faq.question: What if I disagree with the suggested framework?
faq.answer: The framework phase is collaborative. You control the direction and can adjust structure, emphasis, and examples until you are satisfied.

faq.question: How do I handle writer's block?
faq.answer: Start with the diagnosis phase. Often writer's block stems from unclear direction. The skill helps you break through by organizing thoughts before writing.

faq.question: Can I regenerate specific sections?
faq.answer: Yes. After the initial draft, you can request revisions for specific sections, adjust tone, expand examples, or shorten content.
